output.formatted:
The producers of the movie "I Can Only Imagine" are Steve Schaffner and Chris C. Brown.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?producer ?producerLabel WHERE {
  ?movie rdfs:label "I Can Only Imagine" @en ; wdt:P57 ?producer .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?producer rdfs:label ?producerLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?producerLabel) = "en")
  }
}
```
